summary: Classified the hydrated live PR inventory shard without choosing a shared canonical. All open maintainer-owned PRs stay open for normal maintainer review; no close, merge, label, fix, or PR-opening action is safe or permitted for this job. The one hydrated security-sensitive linked ref is routed only to central security handling.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref is outside Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be handled by central OpenClaw security triage only.
